---
title: "Resume"
description: "
[Full Resume](pdf/resume/COMPERAT.Etienne_cv.pdf)
-  [Short Resume (1p)](pdf/resume/COMPERAT.Etienne_cv1p.pdf)
"
open-graph:
  type: article
  url: https://ecomperat.github.io/cv.html
  article:
    author: Étienne Compérat
    section: Resume
---

<a href="#research-experience" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

---
## Education

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Sciences Po</strong> </span><span class="cv-job-date">2023--2025</span></div>
<div class="cv-degree-row"><span class="cv-degree-info">M.Res. in Economics, PhD Track</span></div>
<div class="cv-details">
Master's Thesis (16/20): "Enrichissez-vous!": Education, Suffrage, and Local Development in July Monarchy France
<span class="cv-advisors">Jury: Roberto Galbiati, Emeric Henry (advisors), Kevin O'Rourke</span>
*Awarded Sciences Po Prize for Best Master's Thesis*
</div>

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>University of California, Berkeley</strong></span><span class="cv-job-date">2022--2023</span></div>
<div class="cv-degree-row"><span class="cv-degree-info">Full-Year Exchange Program (B.A.) - Department of Agricultural & Resource Economics</span><span class="cv-gpa">GPA: 4.0</span></div>

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Sciences Po</strong> </span><span class="cv-job-date">2020--2023</span></div>
<div class="cv-degree-row"><span class="cv-degree-info">B.A. in Economics and Political Science</span><span class="cv-gpa">*(Cum laude)*</span></div>

## Research Experience {#research-experience}

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Predoctoral Fellow in Economics</strong> | University of Zurich</span><span class="cv-job-date">July 2025--Present</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Supervisor: Hans-Joachim Voth</span>

<div class="predoc-item">
<span class="swl-title">(Untitled)</span>
<span class="swl-meta"><strong>M. P. Squicciarini and N. Voigtländer</strong></span>
<div class="cv-details">Build reproducible historical data pipelines from archival, textual, administrative, and geospatial sources, with historical geocoding and GIS integration for a project set in Revolutionary France; review period historiography to inform a coding framework for downstream analysis.</div>
</div>

<div class="predoc-item">
<span class="swl-title">Image(s)</span>
<span class="swl-meta"><strong>D. Yanagizawa-Drott</strong></span>
<div class="cv-details">Contribute to the computer-vision workflow, including image preprocessing, labelling and validation, supervised model training, feature extraction, name extraction, and appendix analysis of name norm-deviation.</div>
</div>

<div class="predoc-item">
<span class="swl-title">Fighting for Growth</span>
<span class="swl-meta"><strong>B. Caprettini and A. Trew</strong></span>
<div class="cv-details">Contributed to the documented replication package by writing clean, reproducible code for the empirical analysis.</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>JPE Replicator</strong> | University of Chicago</span><span class="cv-job-date">July 2025--Present</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Data Editor: Florian Oswald</span>
<div class="cv-details">Conduct independent replications of accepted <em>Journal of Political Economy</em> articles under editorial supervision: verify tables and figures from authors' replication packages, review code, run reproducibility and robustness checks, diagnose data and code issues, rebuild software environments when needed, and prepare detailed reports for the Data Editor.</div>

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Research Assistant</strong> | Sciences Po</span><span class="cv-job-date">Summer 2025</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Supervisor: Roberto Galbiati</span>
<div class="cv-details"><strong>Dreyfus Affair: Polarization and Resistance during WWII</strong> (with S. Lauterbach and B. Marx): collected, transcribed, and cleaned archival donor records to construct an individual-level dataset on anti-Dreyfusard mobilisation in late nineteenth-century France.</div>

<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>EJ Replicator</strong> | Royal Economic Society</span><span class="cv-job-date">2024--July 2025</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Data Editor: Florian Oswald</span>
<div class="cv-details">Conducted reproducibility checks for accepted articles at <em>The Economic Journal</em> using authors' replication packages under editorial supervision.</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Research Assistant</strong> | Sciences Po</span><span class="cv-job-date">Summer 2024</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Supervisors: Roberto Galbiati, Aurélie Ouss</span>
<div class="cv-details">Collected, cleaned, and documented individual-level administrative data from police reports, press sources, and death notices for post-1980 France; contributed to data integrity checks and CNIL/GDPR compliance documentation.</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Research Assistant</strong> | CEPREMAP</span><span class="cv-job-date">Summer 2023</span></div>
<span class="cv-supervisor">Supervisor: Mathieu Perona</span>
<div class="cv-details">Contributed to the construction of a database on well-being economics researchers and conducted background research for projects in cultural and well-being economics.</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Research Assistant</strong> | University of California, Berkeley</span><span class="cv-job-date">Spring 2023</span></div>
<div class="predoc-item">
<span class="swl-title">Project on Arms Trade History (PATH)</span>
<div class="cv-details">Extracted nineteenth-century arms-trade data from French customs reports (<em>Tableaux généraux du commerce de la France</em>) using archival microfilms, contributing to the construction of a historical database on the global arms trade.</div>
</div>
</div>

### Additional Experiences

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Assistant Project Manager</strong> | Agence Française de Développement</span><span class="cv-job-date">Summer 2022</span></div>
<div class="cv-details">Conducted economic and environmental analysis of transportation infrastructure projects in Pakistan.</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-job-title-row"><span class="cv-job-title"><strong>Teaching Assistant</strong> | Sciences Po</span><span class="cv-job-date">Fall 2021</span></div>
<div class="cv-details">Teaching assistant in Comparative Political Institutions, undergraduate level.</div>
</div>

## Methods and Programming Skills

<div class="cv-skill-grid">
  <span class="cv-skill-label">Empirical methods</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Causal inference</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Panel data</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Spatial analysis</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Text analysis</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Computer vision</span>
  </span>

  <span class="cv-skill-label">Historical data</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Archival data construction</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Historical GIS</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Geocoding</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">OCR</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Web scraping</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Record linkage</span>
  </span>

  <span class="cv-skill-label">Programming</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Python</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">R</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Stata</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Julia</span>
  </span>

  <span class="cv-skill-label">Tools</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Git</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">LaTeX</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">QGIS</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Google Vertex AI</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Reproducible workflows</span>
  </span>
</div>

## Graduate Coursework

<div class="cv-skill-grid">
  <span class="cv-skill-label">Core Sequences</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Econometrics I-III</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Macroeconomics I-III</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Microeconomics I-II</span>
  </span>

  <span class="cv-skill-label">Computational Economics</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Dynamic Programming</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Incomplete-Market Models</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Numerical Solution Methods</span>
  </span>

  <span class="cv-skill-label">Selected Fields</span>
  <span class="cv-skill-items">
    <span class="cv-tag">Economic History</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Political Economy</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Urban &amp; Regional Economics</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">International Trade</span>
    <span class="cv-tag">Demography</span>
  </span>
</div>

## Languages

<div class="cv-lang-row">
  <span class="cv-lang-pill"><strong>French</strong> <span class="cv-lang-level">Native</span></span>
  <span class="cv-lang-pill"><strong>English</strong> <span class="cv-lang-level">C2</span></span>
  <span class="cv-lang-pill"><strong>Italian</strong> <span class="cv-lang-level">C1</span></span>
  <span class="cv-lang-pill">German <span class="cv-lang-level">B1</span></span>
</div>

<p class="cv-details"><em>Last updated: May 2026</em></p>

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Étienne Compérat",
  "hasCredential": [
    {
      "@type": "EducationalOccupationalCredential",
      "credentialCategory": "degree",
      "name": "Master of Research in Economics",
      "educationalLevel": "Graduate",
      "recognizedBy": {
        "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
        "name": "Sciences Po"
      },
      "dateCreated": "2025"
    },
    {
      "@type": "EducationalOccupationalCredential",
      "credentialCategory": "degree",
      "name": "Bachelor of Arts in Economics and Political Science",
      "educationalLevel": "Undergraduate",
      "recognizedBy": {
        "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
        "name": "Sciences Po"
      },
      "dateCreated": "2023"
    }
  ],
  "workExample": [
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "\"Enrichissez-vous!\": Education, Suffrage, and Local Development in July Monarchy France",
      "description": "Master's Thesis awarded Sciences Po Prize for Best Master's Thesis",
      "author": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Étienne Compérat"
      },
      "datePublished": "2025"
    }
  ]
}
</script>
